name: feature.consent.nodes
description: Consent feature node pack (ADR 0014) — gate/record nodes over the ctx.features.consent surface. check evaluates a subject's consent for a category (fail-closed in regulated regions); record upserts consent from a run. The SAME enforcement helper Analytics/Email consume — one consent rule.
author: OpenWOP App

nodes.label: Consent: Check
nodes.description: Evaluates whether a subject has consented to a category (necessary/analytics/marketing) over ctx.features.consent. Fail-closed in regulated regions.

nodes.label: Consent: Record
nodes.description: Upserts a subject's consent choices over ctx.features.consent (latest-wins).
